name: Low-Fat Oatmeal Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup raisins or any dried fruit (cut into small pieces)
1 egg or 2 egg whites or 1/4 cup egg substitute
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees and spray a muffin tin with cooking spray.
2. In a bowl, mix together the first six ingredients and spread on a paper plate.
3. In the same bowl, mix the remaining ingredients and let sit for 5 minutes. Stir in the previously mixed dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Fill muffin cups almost full with the batter.
5. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into a muffin comes out clean.
6. Remove muffins from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
